info.name: arolariu.ro
info.description:
Comprehensive API and route tests for arolariu.ro Next.js application.

This collection covers:
- Public pages (home, about, domains, legal)
- Protected pages (profile, invoice management)
- API routes (user, webhooks)
- Static assets (SEO, PWA, icons)

**Configuration:**
- Set `baseHost` to target environment (localhost:3000, arolariu.ro)
- Set `baseProtocol` to http/https
- Set `authToken` for authenticated route testing
- Set `invoiceId` for dynamic route testing

**Test Environments:**
- Local: baseHost=localhost:3000, baseProtocol=http
- Production: baseHost=arolariu.ro, baseProtocol=https

exec: console.warn(`Warning: Required variable '${varName}' is not set`);

return requestName.includes('404') || requestName.includes('405') || requestName.includes('Non-existent') || requestName.includes('Method Not Allowed');
// Helper function to check if request is a webhook test

// Skip status check for error handling tests (they expect 4xx/5xx)
return; // Skip - these tests have their own status expectations
return; // Skip - webhook tests have specific expectations
